pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Vert.x to 5.0.3, which requires Java 21.
Upgrade Hibernate to 9.0.1.Final, which requires Jakarta EE 10+ and Java 21.
Add Jakarta EL API dependency to replace deprecated javax.el for Hibernate 9 compatibility.
Update Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.14.0 to support Java 21 compilation.
Add Jakarta EL API dependency to dependency management.

.github/workflows/current-build.yml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to compile and test against Java 21 instead of Java 17.

.github/workflows/pull-requests.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 for building and testing.
